base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of bloober_swim — a character from 1985 super mario bros. squid-like body pulses contract/expand. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 2-frame swim cycle — squid-like body pulses contract/expand; tentacles trail; vertical-chase AI underwater

nudges.delta: next phase of body pulses contract/expand
